reviews.comment:
Fuimos a la tarde, excelente atención del muchacho. Todo limpio. El café es muy rico

(Translated by Google)
We went in the afternoon, and the young man provided excellent service. Everything was clean. The coffee was delicious.

reviews.comment:
Buen día. Hemos tenido que viajar desde Bariloche a  Neuquén  en auto,  para luego tomar un vuelo.. Solicitamos la posibilidad de  dejar el vehículo en resguardo estacionado por un término de 11 días.
Nos respondieron positivamente y recibimos una excelente atención.
Muy atentos,  tanto Diego como Nahuel, se brindaron  con responsabilidad y amabilidad,  cumpliendo correctamente con lo acordado.
Nos ha sido muy útil el servicio prestado, con un costo acorde por ser socio del ACA.
Muchas gracias. Hasta la próxima. Les mandamos un abrazo

(Translated by Google)
Good morning. We had to travel from Bariloche to Neuquén by car, and then catch a flight. We requested the possibility of leaving our vehicle parked safely for 11 days.
They responded positively and we received excellent service.
Both Diego and Nahuel were very attentive, responsible, and kind, fulfilling the agreement perfectly.
The service was very useful to us, and the cost was reasonable for us as ACA members.
Thank you very much. Until next time. Best regards.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1dTRySDlRRRAB
